title: Fourier-Jacobi models for real symplectic-metaplectic groups: the basic case
author_string: Cheng Chen, Rui Chen, Jialiang Zou
abstract: In this paper, we generalize the method of Gan-Ichino and Atobe in [GI16][A18] to the field of real numbers and prove the basic tempered case of the local Gan-Gross-Prasad conjecture for Fourier-Jacobi models of symplectic-metaplectic groups, based on the tempered case of the conjecture for Bessel models proved in [CL22] by Chen-Luo.
